stories.title: H13: Normalize session role in auth.ts
acceptanceCriteria: auth.ts has a normalizeRole() helper that lowercases and trims the input
jwt callback writes token.role = normalizeRole((user as any).role) — not the raw string
session callback assigns session.user.role = normalizeRole(token.role) cast to the union type
types/next-auth.d.ts Session.user.role is typed as union 'owner'|'manager'|'coach'|'admin'|'member'
types/next-auth.d.ts User.role remains string (not narrowed)
npm run build passes with no TypeScript errors

stories.title: C2: Wire profile page name/phone save
acceptanceCriteria: app/member/profile/page.tsx name and phone inputs use value= (controlled), not defaultValue=
Email input has readOnly attribute
A Save button exists that calls PATCH /api/member/me with {name, phone}
Saving shows a success message that auto-clears after ~3s
saving state disables the button during the request
npm run build passes

stories.title: C1: Wire schedule page to real API
acceptanceCriteria: app/member/schedule/page.tsx has no ALL_CLASSES module-level constant
Page calls fetch('/api/member/schedule') in a useEffect on mount
API dayOfWeek (0=Sun JS convention) is mapped to internal dow (1=Mon…7=Sun) via: dayOfWeek === 0 ? 7 : dayOfWeek
scheduleLoading state starts true and is set false in .finally()
DayGrid receives classes and loading props; 'No classes today' is suppressed while loading===true
npm run build passes

stories.title: C5: Create /api/member/classes and rewire Progress page
acceptanceCriteria: app/api/member/classes/route.ts exists and exports a GET handler
GET returns distinct classes attended by the logged-in member, deduped by classId, most-recent first
Returns DEMO_CLASSES array for demo-tenant, empty array for real tenant with no memberId
app/member/progress/page.tsx fetches /api/member/classes instead of /api/member/schedule
Progress page uses a classesLoading flag; empty state suppressed while loading
DEMO_SUBSCRIBED_CLASSES seed removed; subscribedClasses initialized to []
npm run build passes

stories.title: H3: Checkin page reads ?class= deeplink
acceptanceCriteria: app/dashboard/checkin/page.tsx accepts searchParams: Promise<{class?: string}> prop
When ?class=<classId> is present and a today's ClassInstance exists for that classId, it is passed as initialInstanceId
ClassInstance lookup is tenant-scoped (class: { tenantId: session.user.tenantId })
When ?class= given but no today's instance found, chosen stays null (no silent fallback to instances[0])
When no ?class= param, falls back to instances[0] as before
npm run build passes

stories.title: Global: all tests pass and build is clean
acceptanceCriteria: npm test passes all 44 existing tests
npm run build exits with code 0
No TypeScript errors on any changed file
